title: HugglePets Legacy Polar Fleece Explorer Dog Jumper | Super Soft | Mulberry Red | 4 Leg Protection Suit | Pet Coat Clothing | Extra Small (30cm)
features: WARM DOG FLEECE - Consisting of 100% lightweight polyester microfleece, our dog jumpers are made of a warm and breathable fabric, while also boasting an elasticated collar and over-locked stitching.
WATER-RESISTANT - Our super soft dog fleece isn't just a warm jumper, it also wicks away any moisture from your dog’s coat - meaning you're ready for anything on your winter walks.

FULL BODY - Featuring protection for the underbelly and all four legs without any cumbersome fastenings, our fleece dog coat is designed with an open area between the back legs to prevent interference with toileting.

SIZES & COLOURS - The Legacy Dog Coat Fleece is available in six different sizes, from extra small to extra large. With three different colours to choose from including Mulberry, Navy and Khaki, this super soft dogs jumper is machine washable for easy cleaning.

HUGGLEPETS - What began as a humble petshop has since grown to become an established and well-trusted pet care brand selling all over the UK. A family-ran business, our passion is producing high quality products for pets. We're proud to say we've even been featured in prestigious trade shows such as Crufts!
